title: What I think about Rainbow gatherings

transcript.text: Hello this video is what I think about rainbow gatherings I went to a rainbow
Gathering a couple days ago I cop surfed over at somebody's couch in Helsinki and she goes
Yeah my friend is at rainbow gathering right now over in Kuopio and I'm like oh wow okay I'll
Take it up because it was kind of on my way up north so I went to Kuopio and I googled it and I guess
They didn't want to like publish where it was on the internet because they didn't want too many
People to go there um but you have to go on like on the their forum and I signed up for the forum
But they didn't send me the password so but I knew it was near Kuopio so I just googled Kuopio
In the rainbow gathering and somebody had written somewhere what town it was so I went there and it
Was right there so I got there I found it um and it was cool they go in and they had a little welcome
Area which was like a mile before the actual place where it was and there was this Canadian guy there
An older guy who I think was one of the ancient rainbow guys and he's like hey welcome brother
Uh we're gonna we're going to have food circle in just 10 minutes so I'll hang out so I'll hang out
For 10 minutes and they have food circle where they all sit down and they oh but before they do
Some food circle they sing a song like um I don't know some hippie song we bless the mother earth or
Something like that and then they and then they and then they hold hands like this and then they
Change hands and they do the tree thing and then they do like this and then like this and then they
Like hug the ground and then you eat and I hope I'm not giving anything away nobody ever told me
There was a credo against talking about rainbow gathering on internet because I was told that
You're not supposed to bring electronics so that's why I didn't film any of the rainbow gatherer or take
Any pictures even though I saw a lot of other people take pictures but maybe they were taking they
Were part of the group that they were taking pictures off so anyways um because I did ask one
Rainbow guy they were like tomorrow angel walk and I asked some guy I'm like what's angel walk he goes
You stay tomorrow and see and I'm like no but I'm leaving tomorrow I'm not going to be at angel walk
And he goes he goes well if you want to know you stay and you see so I guess maybe it's against a
Rainbow credo to like tell what the rainbow stuff is unless you're actually there to witness it but
I don't know I guess if it's against a rainbow credo just I can you can tell me to delete the video
But I mean I like rainbow gathering rainbow gathering was cool um I think my general impression
Of rainbow gathering and I've been exposed to and met plenty of rainbow gathering people
Um you know I think it originally comes from America late 60s it was just a bunch of hippies
It's hippies and their main thing is to like cherish the earth and live so sustainably
So you go there and all they use is wood it's kind of like trying to go back to caveman days all they
Use is wood so they go in the forest and they collect the wood and then they throw it under these
Big you know metal cauldrons and then they they make the food and you know when they wash their
Clothes probably a lot of them don't even use soap and the ones who do use soap are just like
Well you can't do it like in the in the lake if you have one I saw the sign and stuff but
Just really basic trying to live off the land um so no electronics you know when you have light
It's just candles and stuff but um and then you know so trying to be like caveman again
And then they spend their time you know doing drone circles and then like people go there
There's a guy they're giving Thai massage classes and an old American guy with a really long beard

And the area I was at was really cool it was about 33 kilometers south of Kuopio Finland
And there's this big lake down there you walk to the edge of it and there's this big like sweat lodge
There and there's a really cool design for the sweat lodge they have this hole dug in the ground and then
Then deep in this hole they have this like fort this like big cauldron where they would stick the

On it makes it really hot and you hang out in there and then like people can bring like mud
Or clay that you can put all over your body and then jump in the river and get it get it off and
Like you start jumping the lake and I'd jump in the lake and walk and swim like 100 meters

And like no we were even two and I decided my second day to be one of the guys who's completely

Used to the idea of being completely naked around all these clothed people and not being like paranoid
About it or whatever I got I was like you know stay completely naked because once you go completely

Clearing the energy vibrating energy to the point where all the mosquitoes can't be here because
There were like no mosquitoes it was a miracle you know in northern Finland or halfway up Finland
Big lake and swamps everywhere no mosquitoes it was awesome and uh yeah so I was completely naked
Walking around and it was awesome to be completely naked because like you know every single square
Centimeter of your body you can soak up all the sun and feel all the breeze so you get all the sun
Vitamins and the air vitamins and you know um and actually do feel like you're a caveman
And but I mean the hippie clothes that they wear is really artistic you can express yourself a lot of ways
In your clothes and also with the dreadlocks all different kinds of hair that they had was really cool
You know like some girl had the dreads only coming out of the front and I mean you name it they had
The haircut haircut it was really really cool but and you can express yourself with clothes but I mean
Clothes are cumbersome they hide your body and I think it's cool to show your body and I mean I have
A nice body now because I've been riding my bike so you know I felt like I wanted to do that but
Anyways that was cool oh no I'm out of time so anyway that's what I think about rainbow gathering
